text: Reminder: all deployments must go through the CI/CD pipeline. No manual kubectl commands in production.
When we get a P0 incident, first check the Grafana dashboard at grafana.internal/d/api-latency.
How do we handle database migrations for the payments service?
Step 1: Create migration with alembic revision. Step 2: Test on staging. Step 3: Run during maintenance window.
Also make sure to backup the database before any migration. We got burned last quarter.
New runbook for incident response attached
The staging environment credentials are in 1Password vault 'Engineering Shared'.
For hotfixes: create branch from main, get one approval, merge, deploy immediately. Skip the normal release cycle.
